title: KARACA Porcelain Espresso Cup Set of 6, 12 Piece, 100ml, White Gold, Modern Design
features: INCLUDES: Karaca Malta Turkish Coffee Set is great to serve your drinks for 6 people, 12 pieces set includes espresso cups set of 6 cups and 6 saucers.
LARGE CAPACITY: Each cup holds 100 ml, the perfect amount of Turkish coffee for your rest. These small espresso cups have large enough capacity.
MODERN DESIGN: porcelain espresso cups are practical and versatile. This set has an elegant, simple, modern design.

EXCELENT GIFT: With its unparalleled beauty and aesthetics that will last for years, it makes a great gift for new households and families as the simple yet elegant design allows for versatility and suits all tastes.

WE'VE GOT A LOT TO SHARE: Karaca has been the largest Turkish manufacturer of high-quality tableware, kitchenware, home textiles, and small appliances since 1973. As the Karaca family, we care about your experience and we feel blessed to be a part of your home
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Karaca elegance with the Malta 6-Person Turkish Coffee Cup Set, a graceful ensemble that redefines the art of coffee indulgence. Crafted with precision and adorned with the signature Karaca touch, this exquisite collection invites you to savour the true essence of Turkish coffee.This set boasts 6 dainty 100ml espresso cups, each a masterpiece in itself, reflecting the perfect marriage of form and function. The Malta set is not just cups; it's a journey into the heart of coffee culture, where every sip becomes a moment to cherish. The accompanying saucers add a touch of sophistication, ensuring your coffee moments are presented flawlessly.Whether you're an aficionado of espresso or a devoted admirer of small coffee cups, the Malta set resonates with Karaca's commitment to craftsmanship. Be it a tranquil morning ritual or an intimate gathering, these cups transform your coffee experience into a symphony of taste and style.Elevate your mornings, add a touch of elegance to your afternoons, and embrace the warmth of togetherness in your evenings with the Karaca Malta 6-Person Turkish Coffee Cup Set. It's not just a collection; it's an embodiment of tradition, luxury, and the finer pleasures of life that Karaca embodies effortlessly.
